message:
bd-ml2r.3.1: implement FNX parser-side structural diagnostics

Add fnx_diagnostics module with graph-theoretic analysis for diagrams:

- FnxDiagnosticCode enum with machine-readable codes (FNX-CONN-001, etc.)
- FnxDiagnosticSeverity levels (Info, Warning, Error)
- FnxDiagnostic struct with spans, related nodes/edges, suggestions
- analyze_structure() runs connected_components, articulation_points,
  bridges, and cycle_basis analyses
- Detects disconnected islands, choke points, fragile bridges, dense cycles
- 8 unit tests covering all diagnostic types and determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
